ops.text: Shipped as 49cadba01ab7 (main, 2026-07-18; all CI green incl. the new pack job): the full cc-present v2 rebuild. Pack: host API 2 (0.2.0) — tokens-only styling, one-bold-line summary tiers with disclosure, NoteBar comments on every block (merge idiom, agent replies via reply --block), availability multi-select {picks[]}, option-picker deleted for built-in choice, new getaway.booking sheet ({seat,why} picks, per-currency totals, plural links). CLI: aircraft_code, seat-advice enhancer (targets/merge/finalize fold, notable stretches included), sweep_summary (current-plan-scoped, fingerprinted), store v3 (cache stamps back fetchedAt). Flow docs: one artifact per trip, rounds as phases (intake → Finalists → Head to head → Booking sheet → close), event protocol + routing rule, boards.md shapes, fallback rule; Submit on the booking round = booked-it confirmation (host counts note-only blocks as decision units — papercut filed). Verified: 1151 pytest / ruff / ty / 51 node tests / pack lint; sol finder+refuter review (18+13 findings, all confirmed ones fixed or ruled); live browser QA all-pass both themes (payloads verified verbatim: merge idiom preserves note across toggles and clear); enhancer scratch-trip end-to-end. Attached: intake, finalists, and booking sheet renders from the QA run.
